description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image, includes mysql:latest and postgres:latest services, and caches pip packages in ~/.cache/pip/. Define a global variable POSTGRES_DB set to database_name and a before_script that prints the Python version and installs dependencies with pip install -r requirements.txt. Add a test job in the default test stage named test that runs python manage.py test and sets a job‑specific DATABASE_URL variable pointing to the postgres service using the POSTGRES_DB variable. The pipeline has no explicit artifacts or rules, so the test job runs on every pipeline execution.
